help_bk215Host: IPv4 address of the storage device on the local network. Leave empty when using mDNS discovery.
help_bk215Serial: Used for identification in multi-device setups. Can be left blank.
help_enableMdnsDiscovery: Automatically locates BK215 devices on the LAN. Recommended.
help_bk215IdleTimeoutMs: Forces a reconnect attempt if no data has been received from the BK215 for this duration.
intro_grid: Select the ioBroker state that holds the net active power at the house connection (positive = import, negative = export). Typical: shelly.0.Shelly3EM-XXXXXX.Total.act_power
help_gridStatePath: Full path of the state that provides grid power in watts.
help_gridStaleTimeoutS: If exceeded, the controller drops to the safe state (0 W).
intro_controller: Position-form PI controller for zero feed-in. A 3–5 second tick interval has proven stable in practice.
help_controllerEnabled: Auto-start when the adapter loads. Can be toggled at runtime via controller.enabled.
help_controllerTargetGridW: 0 W = strict zero feed-in. Positive = allow some import. Negative = allow active export.
help_controllerIntervalMs: On each tick a setpoint is computed and, if needed, sent to the BK215.
help_controllerDeadbandW: Errors within this band are treated as zero. Saves hardware wear under measurement noise.
help_controllerKp: Typical range 0.5–0.9. Higher = more aggressive, may oscillate.
help_controllerKi: Typical range 0.02–0.1. Higher = faster zero-error tracking, may overshoot.
help_inverterMaxPowerW: Hard cap on the controller output. 800 W is typical for German balcony installations.
intro_safety: These values prevent the storage from reaching BMS limits. They are applied on top of the device-internal limits.
help_socSafetyBuffer: Extra margin above the SoC floor to absorb measurement noise.
intro_aps: Optional integration of an APsystems EZ1 inverter for direct PV telemetry (PV power, AC output). Improves controller accuracy.
intro_cloud: Optional: API token for the Sunlit cloud, if cloud telemetry should serve as a backup. Stored encrypted.
